sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n106703" key="u(mnago/rhs" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑμν-ᾰγόρης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εω</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n106703.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">singer of hymns,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">9.525.21</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
